root_text.sn33.2:1.2: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho vacchagotto paribbājako bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.sn33.2:1.3: “ko nu kho, bho gotama, hetu, ko paccayo, yānimāni anekavihitāni diṭṭhigatāni loke uppajjanti—
root_text.sn33.2:1.4: sassato lokoti vā, asassato lokoti vā …pe…
root_text.sn33.2:1.5: neva hoti na na hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇāti vā”ti?
root_text.sn33.2:1.6: “Vedanāya kho, vaccha, aññāṇā, vedanāsamudaye aññāṇā, vedanānirodhe aññāṇā, vedanānirodhagāminiyā paṭipadāya aññāṇā;
root_text.sn33.2:1.8: sassato lokoti vā, asassato lokoti vā …pe…
root_text.sn33.2:1.9: neva hoti na na hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇāti vāti.
root_text.sn33.2:1.10: Ayaṁ kho, vaccha, hetu, ayaṁ paccayo, yānimāni anekavihitāni diṭṭhigatāni loke uppajjanti—
root_text.sn33.2:1.11: sassato lokoti vā, asassato lokoti vā …pe…
root_text.sn33.2:1.12: neva hoti na na hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇāti vā”ti.

translation_text.sn33.2:1.2: Then the wanderer Vacchagotta said to the Buddha:
translation_text.sn33.2:1.3: “What is the cause, worthy Gotama, what is the reason why these various misconceptions arise in the world? That is:
translation_text.sn33.2:1.4: the cosmos is eternal, or not eternal …
translation_text.sn33.2:1.5: after death, a realized one neither still exists nor no longer exists.”
translation_text.sn33.2:1.6: “Vaccha, it is because of not knowing feeling, its origin, its cessation, and the practice that leads to its cessation
translation_text.sn33.2:1.7: that these various misconceptions arise in the world.
translation_text.sn33.2:1.10: This is the cause, this is the reason.”
